svg.title: GridSearchCV → OOF → meta_train → Meta-classifier, horizontal
svg.desc: Left-to-right flow: five models each go through GridSearchCV then produce OOF probabilities, all merge into meta_train, which feeds the Logistic Regression meta-classifier outputting y_pred.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('GridSearchCV for RF: cv=3, n=100 depth=20')
sendPrompt('What shape is meta_train and what does each column represent?')
sendPrompt('Why is Logistic Regression used as the meta-classifier?')
